metadata.title: Physical Security Assessment
metadata.description: Comprehensive evaluation of physical security measures including access control, surveillance, and perimeter security.
metadata.author: Macha Group

categories.title: Access Control Systems
categories.description: Evaluation of keypads, card readers, and biometric systems

questions.text: Are the access control keypads operational and functioning as intended?
questions.helpText: Check if all keypads are powered on and responsive

questions.text: Do the keypads reliably authenticate users and grant access to restricted areas?
Are access codes used with the keypads sufficiently secure and resistant to unauthorized access or guessing?
questions.helpText: Rate on scale of 1-5 where 5 is most secure

questions.text: Is there a process for periodically changing access codes to enhance security?

categories.title: Card Reader Systems
categories.description: Assessment of card reader functionality and security

questions.text: Are there any signs of malfunction or errors in card reader operations?
Are there backup systems in place in case of power outages or malfunctions?
Are there instructions or guidelines available to users regarding proper card usage and access procedures?

categories.title: Surveillance Systems
categories.description: Evaluation of CCTV cameras and monitoring capabilities

questions.text: Is there real-time monitoring and recording of camera feeds from entrances?
What areas are covered by surveillance cameras? Describe blind spots if any.
